title: calathiana verna
intro: Calathiana verna, also known as Marsh Marigold, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Calathiana verna include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
